message: Hi team, let's have a mood check send an emoji to describe your mood
I'll go first, :thumbsup:
:thumbsup:
I'm excited about showing off all your hard work at todays stakeholder meeting
:skull: knackered, had a few too many late nights this week
:rainbow:
living the dream :smile:
:smirk: im excited to see the show too
shouldn't you be prepping for the meeting
:sweat_smile: i am indeed I'll leave you lot to it
hang in there @daniel its gonne be the weekend sooner or later :joy:
I should get on with my prep too have a good day team
@shay strict diet of energy drink for me today lol
hope the presentation goes well @tinus
:raised_hands:

Welcome to Rumours, remember communication is key to diagnose the problem.

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked Start button
:alarm_clock: - You have 20 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Hey team, I'm texting from the board room - kinda embarrassing but in my demo to the board, I tried to add a pair of Aviator sunglasses to the shopping cart and I got a ?http 500?
I've bought some time but need this be able to do this demo if we can lets get this sorted in the next 20 minutes.
Metrics
uh oh, those Aviators are top sellers due to the new Top Gun movie...It's size up the issue time Amy Jeanes
Come on this can't be happening!
I'm in this meeting so, wont be able to help but I trust that you all can get this fixed asap, just @ me if you need anything
ok looking into this now
I was just able to order some sunglasses myself so it might not be a total outage
:star: Attempt to replicate the issue
Yeah same here, not able to replicate on my end
Tinus can you tell us exactly what steps you took to recreate this problem
:star: Ask team members to provide evidence of their assertions
I just tried to place an order for those aviators
and ran into that error
Tinus how many did you order, anything else in your cart, language settings etc? anything that might be different
I'm able to buy time for now and move on, but let's get this sorted. I won't be the most responsive
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Just one, everything else was the same
Hey, what's going on. Tinus just told me he's facing an issue in the board meeting
Is this an incident?
Bob are you hearing any reports of errors from customers?
No, I haven't received any reports on this so far
the grafana monitoring is also not showing any issues here
:star: Use metrics as evidence
Yeah, it may just be on Tinus' end
Potentially but we're unable to replicate the issue so far and no customers are reporting anything
and all of our monitoring looks normal
Is it worth looking at the recent deployments? Do you think any of those could be responsible?
potentially yes Shay what deployments have happened recently
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Okay, this is still high stakes though. Not a good look in front of our shareholders
Let me check

CHG89359:PaymentService:version 1.6 deployed:PROD:Daniel
CHG89358:CheckoutService:version 4.6 deployed:PROD:Shay
CHG89360:AdService:version 8.4 deployed:PROD:Tanya
These were pushed in the past hour
can anyone else recreate this problem?
:star: Reproduces the incident
No I'm not able to
Nor me...
Okay i will declare an incident but the scope of it is currently unknown
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
SEV-3 Unable to add sunglasses to basket for some users
*Incident Number INC100098:* SEV-3 Unable to add sunglasses to basket for some users
What's our current theory?
:star: Incident record created
Not sure, but we could try rolling back the change to the checkout service?
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Could be worth a go
Is it only affecting the aviators product though?
Looks safe to rollback, shall I try that?
Tinus does this happen for other products or just the aviators
Just the aviators, I've been able to demo the other products okay
Shay okay go for it
I've moved on from it but let's get this fixed before the end of the meeting ideally. I have 10 mins to go
On it
It seems to only be the aviators as far as we can see, we are rolling back a change in the checkout service to attempt to restore
Rollback complete
Tinus how is it now
Still not working for me...
Why would it only be affecting him? What's different with his setup compared to everyone else's?
Tinus where exactly did you run into this error, during what step? can you walk us through exactly the steps you took
:star: Facts over opinion
I just went onto the product page, added aviators to basket, checked out, then got that error
the error is saying it can't find a product id, maybe it's a cache error on the browser? Tinus try clearing browser cache and trying again
I notice the product id on his message is different to what is showing on mine
Could be worth a shot
His reads #OLJCESPC7D, whereas for me it shows #OLJCESPC7Z
Could definitely be a caching issue
One sec, let me try

I can also see this error being logged: {"error":"failed to complete the order: rpc error: code = Internal desc = failed to charge card: could not charge the card: rpc error: code = Code(400) desc = Sorry, we cannot process visa_electron credit cards. Only VISA or MasterCard is accepted.","http.req.id":"0a890b83-5977-4d92-be85-6ed56c060e68","http.req.method":"POST","http.req.path":"/cart/checkout","message":"request error","session":"9ec53919-f006-47ac-95c5-26d864843f40","severity":"error","timestamp":"2025-09-25T13:15:58.874559176Z"}
But that might be unrelated if it's erroring when adding to the basket
Hmm, yeah worth keeping track of that, not sure if it is related
Okay I've just cleared my cache
Tinus okay and try again?
Damn that's it!
we rolled back the change but still seeing the error - we think it might be a caching error on Tinus' end
Thank you for finding that
and  yes indeed it was!
Okay so we're all good?
Good find!
Yeah we're good, thanks again!
Incident is resolved now - caching issue on Tinus' end
Brilliant, thanks for identifying that
Good luck with the rest of the presentation Tinus!
